# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "**"

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

defaults:
  run:
    shell: bash

jobs:
  ci:
    name: Test & Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Unit tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: ci
    timeout-minutes: 20
    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    environment:
      name: staging
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          STAGING_DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_COMMAND }}
        run: |
          if [[ -n "${STAGING_DEPLOY_COMMAND}" ]]; then
            eval "${STAGING_DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
          else
            echo "No deploy command provided. Set STAGING_DEPLOY_COMMAND secret (e.g., 'npm run deploy:staging')."
            exit 1
          fi
